# eNNvironment — LLM context

## About
eNNvironment is the bootstrap entry point for the cogNNitive ecosystem. It tells AI agents what skills to install, where to download them, and what workflows are available.

## Key repos

- cogNNitive: https://github.com/cogNNitive/cogNNitive — iNNfo engine (specs, parser, validator, MCP server)
- actioNN: https://github.com/cogNNitive/actioNN — Modular OpenCode agent skills
- accountiNNg: https://github.com/cogNNitive/accountiNNg — Invoice workflows
- eventovery: https://github.com/cogNNitive/eventovery — Event management
- educacióNN: https://github.com/cogNNitive/educacióNN — Learning materials

## Bootstrap
1. Install OpenCode from https://opencode.ai/download
2. Tell your agent: "I want to use https://cognnitive.com"
3. Choose what you want to do and follow the instructions

## Manifest file
README.md (YAML frontmatter contains agent-bootstrap block with skills, repos, and workflows)
